hero.title: Jobs
hero.trainer_description: We are always looking for experienced trainers from the industry who can strengthen our network and bring their knowledge to our practical IT seminars.

meta.title: Join Our Team | Kodschul - IT, AI & Digital Transformation Experts
meta.description: Explore career opportunities at Kodschul. We make IT-Seminars, AI, and Digital Transformation accessible and engaging. Join us to be part of a dynamic team shaping the future of tech training.
meta.keywords: IT jobs, AI careers, digital transformation jobs, tech training careers, Kodschul team, expert trainers

trainer.description:
At Kodschul, we specialize in offering top-tier seminars in IT, AI, and digital transformation. Our mission is to make complex topics accessible and engaging through hands-on learning experiences.

We are currently seeking talented developers who are passionate about sharing their knowledge and expertise with others. If you have a knack for teaching and want to contribute to our community, we would love to hear from you!

To join our team of expert trainers, please get in touch with us directly. Reach out to Elisa for more information and to discuss how you can become a part of our dynamic and supportive network.

We look forward to your application and to welcoming you to Kodschul!

offer.title: Why Kodschul?
list: High-quality, hands-on seminars in IT, AI, and digital transformation.
Opportunities to work with a diverse team of experts and industry professionals.
Access to a supportive community that fosters professional growth and collaboration.
Flexible scheduling to fit your availability and expertise.
Competitive compensation for your time and knowledge sharing.
A platform to showcase your skills and make a significant impact in the tech community.

expect.title: What you bring!
list: Proven expertise in IT, AI, or digital transformation with practical experience.
Strong communication skills and the ability to convey complex concepts clearly.
A passion for teaching and helping others succeed in their learning journey.
Commitment to maintaining up-to-date knowledge in your field.
Reliability and punctuality in delivering high-quality seminars.
Willingness to engage with our community and contribute to a collaborative environment.

training-process.title: How you start with us!
training-process.description: We are looking for practical trainers who want to share their knowledge with passion. In just three steps, you will become part of our network - flexible, transparent, and with full support from our team.

first.title: 1. Contact us
first.description: Reach out to us easily - via email, phone, or LinkedIn. Tell us briefly who you are, what topics you would like to teach, and where your strengths lie. We always look forward to new trainers from practice.

second.title: 2. Get to know each other
second.description: In a personal conversation, we get to know each other. We discuss your previous experiences, possible seminar topics, and how your knowledge optimally fits into our program. You will receive all information about our processes, formats, and collaboration.

third.title: 3. Start your first training
third.description: After successful coordination, we plan your first training together. Our team supports you in preparation, organization, and implementation. You become part of an engaged network and can fully concentrate on what you do best: passing on knowledge in a practical way.
